title: boronia oxyantha var. brevicalyx
intro: Boronia oxyantha var. brevicalyx is a rare and lesser-known variety of the boronia plant, a species of flowering plant in the citrus family Rutaceae, native to Australia. Traditionally, the boronia plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which is rich in terpenes and has antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of boronia include its potential to alleviate anxiety and stress, promote relaxation, and soothe skin irritations and wounds. Boronia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oil, salves, and infusions, which can be used topically or in aromatherapy to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
